title: Spindled
description: A mod about adding Medieval weapons for 1.20.1
body:
This mod adds a few medieval weapons, and recipes, using mainly  Steel, a new material crafted from Iron and coal.

## WEAPONS ADDED:

-Rapier

-Montante

-Dagger

-Sabre

-Longsword

-Naginata

## WEAPON STATS:

Rapier: 6 attack dmg, 2.2 attack speed

Montante: 9 attack dmg, 1 attack speed

Dagger: 4 attack dmg, 3 attack speed, can be used in off-hand.

Sabre: 7 attack dmg, 2.2 attack speed, comparable to the Rapier.

Longsword: 7 attack dmg, 2 attack speed

Naginata: 7 attack dmg, 2.2 attack speed

## RECIPE INFO

Most recipes use steel and iron materials. I would reccommend using JEI, EMI, or any other item recipe viewer.
